flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of West Alabama fell 45% between 2021 and 2024 (26.0% → 14.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of West Alabama fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (39.1% → 34.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of West Alabama fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of West Alabama rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 3.0k).
